prompt.text: Fill AO Crucible until it is junior-engineer-ready and implementation-ready.

plan.title: AO Crucible completion
plan.goal: Make AO Crucible concrete enough that a junior engineer can scaffold and implement the adversarial hardening layer without guessing.
non_goals: do not scaffold the AO Crucible implementation repository
do not execute real exploit payloads

steps.rationale: Define the product, users, goals, non-goals, and AO framework relationships before implementation begins.
acceptance: define users and jobs to be done
document v0.1 goals and non-goals
include production readiness definition

steps.rationale: Define planned CLI, package boundaries, data flow, storage layout, integration limits, and error handling.
acceptance: define CLI commands and package responsibilities
describe scenario-to-gate data flow
document fixture mode and live mode boundaries

steps.rationale: Make every machine-readable contract and fixture expectation explicit.
acceptance: list schema paths for every contract family
define required fields and validation rules
include valid and invalid fixture names

steps.rationale: Make resilience scoring, severity mapping, and hardening gate blockers deterministic.
acceptance: define 100 point resilience formula
include penalties and blocker rules
include worked scoring examples

steps.rationale: Define the canonical adversarial scenarios before product scaffolding.
acceptance: define exactly ten adversarial scenarios
include probe family and expected safe behavior
document evidence requirements and stop conditions

steps.rationale: Keep AO Crucible public-safe and fail-closed by default.
acceptance: define forbidden actions in fixture mode
list secret and local path detection rules
document live run opt in requirements

steps.rationale: Translate the SDD into junior-engineer-sized implementation work.
acceptance: define exact future files per slice
include test commands and acceptance checks
order slices by dependency

steps.rationale: Define what 100 percent plan and product readiness mean.
acceptance: define SDD readiness gate
define product verification commands
define competitive and public safety gates

steps.rationale: Provide a clear handoff from planning to AO Foundry or AO Forge implementation.
acceptance: document SDD file index in README
write handoff prompt with constraints
include planner prompt and implementation readiness verdict

steps.rationale: Prove the SDD documents are concrete and ready for implementation planning.
acceptance: verify AO2 SDD validation passes
scan docs for placeholder text
report remaining blockers if any
